creator: sergey@akhmatov.ru
text:
Created attachment 223049
kafkacat-1.6.0

Update net/kafkacat to 1.6.0

ChangeLog: https://github.com/edenhill/kafkacat/releases/tag/1.6.0

- Transactional Producer support 
- Honour -k <key> when producing files
- Honour -o <offset> in -G high-level consumer mode
- Added -m <seconds> argument to set metadata/query/transaction timeouts.
- Allow schema.registry.url to be configured in config file and not only by -r.
- Print broker-id message was produced to (if -v),or was consumed from (if -J.
